changes_made: Removed forms.md, reference.md, LICENSE.txt, and scripts/ directory (not needed for extraction or creation tasks)
Rewrote SKILL.md to focus only on pdfplumber extraction and reportlab creation
Added explicit guidance to capture ALL table columns when converting to JSON
Added structured summary writing guidance with markdown tables, growth metrics, highlights, and recommendations
Added quick reference table for common operations
Kept examples concrete with actual Python code patterns that work reliably
key_findings: pdf-create task was already reliable (100/100 across all iterations)
document-pdf task was sensitive to SKILL.md content - overly generic examples caused the model to fail extraction
The critical fix was adding explicit guidance to capture ALL columns from extracted tables (model was skipping YTD and YoY columns)
Summary quality improved from 0.5 to 1.0 with explicit guidance on what to include (growth metrics, highlights, recommendations)
Smaller models benefit from concrete, specific examples over abstract patterns
